tools.name: betterpost_create_project
tools.description: Create a content project. Slow, one-shot: infers config (criteria, industry, tone), discovers sources, and gathers/ranks an initial set of timely stories. Best called after the inferred audience, description, and tone have been confirmed with the user, since the config shapes everything downstream.

tools.name: betterpost_generate_content
tools.description: Generate a new piece of content for a project from its timely, relevant stories. Fast in steady state. Charges credits on success only. If you pass a `topic` the project has no stories about, this returns a `topic_unavailable` error (no charge) carrying an `inScope` flag and next steps — it never si

tools.name: betterpost_derive_content
tools.description: Transform an existing piece into another format (e.g. newsletter → tweet). No fetching; reuses the source stories and topic.

tools.name: betterpost_list_content
tools.description: List a project's content (summaries + shareable `publicUrl` links).

tools.name: betterpost_get_content
tools.description: Fetch one piece of content in full.

tools.name: betterpost_delete_content
tools.description: Delete a piece of content and its hosted images.

tools.name: betterpost_list_projects
tools.description: Returns your projects, each with its relevance `criteria` (with ids) that define what counts as on-topic.

tools.name: betterpost_get_project
tools.description: Returns one project with its relevance `criteria` (each with an id, so a criterion can be targeted for removal via betterpost_update_project).

tools.name: betterpost_update_project
tools.description: Updates a project's title, audience, description, tone, freshness window, timezone, or relevance criteria, and returns the updated project with its criteria. Changing title/audience/description re-derives the relevance criteria (replace-all), which broadens or narrows what counts as on-topic. To edi

tools.name: betterpost_delete_project
tools.description: Permanently deletes a project and everything in it — its sources, stories, and content. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: betterpost_list_sources
tools.description: Returns one slimmed page of a project's sources plus project-wide `total` and `counts` (ok/failing/disabled/pending, and byType). Page with `limit` (default 50) and `offset`, following the returned `nextOffset` until it is null.

tools.name: betterpost_add_source
tools.description: Adds a source to a project and fetches it immediately (bounded by a few seconds), returning `storiesAdded` so the next generate_content can use it; if it is still fetching it returns `fetched:false` with a note. Doubles as manual source import: paste any URL (RSS/Atom feed, article, or a page, profi

tools.name: betterpost_remove_source
tools.description: Removes a source from a project. Its already-gathered stories stay; the source is no longer fetched.

tools.name: betterpost_list_stories
tools.description: Returns a project's gathered stories, each with `title`, `url`, `summary`, `relevancy`, `publicationDate`, and `isManual`/`isHidden` flags. Pass includeHidden to include hidden ones.

tools.name: betterpost_add_story
tools.description: Manually imports a story you read about from its URL (pinned relevance, flagged is_manual) so generation can draw on it.

tools.name: betterpost_hide_story
tools.description: Hides a story so generation ignores it. Reversible with unhide_story.

tools.name: betterpost_unhide_story
tools.description: Unhides a previously hidden story so generation can use it again.

tools.name: betterpost_suggest_topics
tools.description: Clusters a project's current stories into a few candidate angles — each with a label, how many stories back it, and example headlines — and warms the project (gathers and ranks fresh stories) in the process. Returns topics you can offer the user before generate_content.

tools.name: betterpost_get_usage
tools.description: Your credit balance, freeze state, and recent spend.

tools.name: betterpost_get_settings
tools.description: Returns a project's per-content-type settings (wordLimit and additionalInstructions for each channel).

tools.name: betterpost_update_settings
tools.description: Patches one content type's wordLimit and/or additionalInstructions (free-form writing guidance for that type; pass an empty string to clear it). Project-wide preferences (title/audience/tone, project-wide additionalInstructions) live on betterpost_update_project.

tools.name: betterpost_expand_coverage
tools.description: Broadens a project's coverage: expands the relevance criteria (when needed), finds more sources across news, the web, and the relevant social platforms, and fetches them inline. Applies on a `topic_unavailable`, `no_stories`, or low-coverage signal. May return `warming: true` with `retryAfterMs` (~6

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "betterpost_generate_content" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Generate a new piece of content for a project from its timely, relevant stories. Fast in steady state. Charges credits on success only. If you pass a `topic` th…

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: betterpost_add_source, betterpost_list_stories, betterpost_add_story · Public sink: betterpost_derive_content, betterpost_add_source · Destructive: betterpost_derive_content, betterpost_delete_content, betterpost_delete_project, betterpost_remove_source.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: betterpost_add_source, betterpost_list_stories, betterpost_add_story · Public sink: betterpost_derive_content, betterpost_add_source · Destructive: betterpost_derive_content, betterpost_delete_content, betterpost_delete_project, betterpost_remove_source

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
